summary: ANDROID 🟥 FALCON 🎧 "Falcon" code name on onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens show internal code name "Falcon" instead of the correct Poly product name
description_clean: Onboarding screens display the internal code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name for the Poly device.
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the onboarding screens that appear on first launch or after factory reset
Look for the device name displayed on the onboarding screens
expected: The onboarding screens display the proper product name (e.g., "Poly Voyager Focus 2") for the Poly device.
actual: The onboarding screens display the internal code name "Falcon" instead of the proper product name.
